details: Participated in coding clubs, tech workshops, and collaborative projects while strengthening problem solving, teamwork, and practical software development. Core study areas included C++, Python, SQL, JavaScript, web development, data structures and algorithms, encryption, decryption, and cybersecurity.

Completed foundation training in C and Python followed by a .NET bootcamp focused on C#, ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework, REST API development, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, OOP, debugging, and practical backend project delivery.

Included Building Services with ASP.NET Web API, Object Oriented Development using C#, Programming in C#, Open Source Software Development Methods, and Introduction to Cyber Security Tools & Cyber Attacks.
